name: Romanian Sausages (Mititei)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the garlic well in the water using a fork.
2. Stir the meat, baking soda, seasonings, and garlic puree together.
3. Add beef stock and mix well.
4. For each sausage, take 1/3 cup of the meat mixture and roll it between your palms into a sausage shape about 4 inches long.
5. Place sausages side by side in a container and cover.
6. Refrigerate overnight so that the flavors can blend.
7. These are excellent on the grill. They may also be broiled or baked in the oven.
8. Broil the sausages for about 3 minutes per side until cooked through and browned.
